title: Brave Search server with an API-key env is REVIEW

origin.description: Public documentation config from modelcontextprotocol/servers-archived (src/brave-search/README.md). Unmodified snippet; placeholders such as <YOUR_TOKEN> are upstream's own.

humanExpectation.rationale: An API-key env is a credential surface to review; the pinned image and docker env flag are benign, so the verdict is REVIEW rather than BLOCK.
knownLimitations: The key name matches the credential heuristic; the placeholder value is not validated.
